address.map_location: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering For Women , Visakhapatnam

pos_sentences.text: Encourage students in tech clubs and hackathons.
pos_sentences.name: Praveena Maganti

pos_sentences.text: Solve doubts without hesitation and encourage students in sports
pos_sentences.name: Praveena Maganti

pos_sentences.text: The college should need renovation and should keep proper benches
pos_sentences.name: Adari reshma

pos_sentences.text: I liked the college with best faculty teachings
pos_sentences.name: Maddimsetti raga Bhargavi

pos_sentences.text: I liked this college with lab sessions and exams and improve our college
pos_sentences.name: Maddimsetti raga Bhargavi

pos_sentences.text: College provide in-depth knowledge and problem solving techniques
pos_sentences.name: Peddimsetti Surya bhavya

pos_sentences.text: Many technical club activities are available .
pos_sentences.name: VAKACHARLA MOHANA

pos_sentences.text: Technical Events and training programs, hackathons
pos_sentences.name: P Susmitha

pos_sentences.text: Expertise dedication and Supportive approach towards students academic by faculty ,good campus
pos_sentences.name: Nalla Sri Ramya

pos_sentences.text: There is no ragging in the college. In my college we have Anti ragging committe.
pos_sentences.name: Dasari Bhavana

neg_sentences.text: Sports room we should need some more facilities in it
neg_sentences.name: Adari reshma

neg_sentences.text: I dislike the college in lab computers they didn't work at all
neg_sentences.name: Maddimsetti raga Bhargavi

neg_sentences.text: It has high tution fees and now a days my college increases the fees
neg_sentences.name: Peddimsetti Surya bhavya

neg_sentences.text: Library is not spacious for all branches .
neg_sentences.name: VAKACHARLA MOHANA

neg_sentences.text: This college does not support extra curricular activities .
neg_sentences.name: VAKACHARLA MOHANA

neg_sentences.text: connectivity issues sometimes in labs during practice .
neg_sentences.name: Ravulapenta Radhika

neg_sentences.text: There are very few cultural events are conducted in my college.
neg_sentences.name: Dasari Bhavana

neg_sentences.text: Some of the lab incharges are quite rude.
neg_sentences.name: KANISETTY Vasavi

neg_sentences.text: In the laboratories all components are not worked.
neg_sentences.name: Triveni

neg_sentences.text: There are no celebrations regarding to any festivals.
neg_sentences.name: PAVANI
